name: Binary Search
description: Search a sorted array for a target value in O(log n) time
preconditions: array must be sorted in ascending order
array must have at least one element
postconditions: returns index of target if found
result index is within bounds [0, len(arr))

name: Linear Search
description: Search an array for a target value in O(n) time
preconditions: array must have at least one element
postconditions: returns index of first occurrence of target if found

name: Bubble Sort
description: Sort an array using bubble sort in O(n²) time
postconditions: array is sorted in ascending order

name: Merge Sort
description: Sort an array using merge sort in O(n log n) time
postconditions: array is sorted in ascending order

name: Quick Sort
description: Sort an array using quicksort in O(n log n) average time
postconditions: array is sorted in ascending order
